changed_failed_assumption: Global and composition-only transport are replaced by a source-environment-conditional same-candidate transport; inference is judged by simultaneous hull-decision certificates rather than a global energy-radius ceiling.

observable_representation.input: policy-visible JARVIS low-fidelity relaxed structure only

calibration_partition.evaluation_systems: the sealed task evaluation partition; never used by any fit or calibration rule

environment_transport.ridge_penalty: selected by leave-one-exact-system-out prediction error on transport-fit systems
environment_transport.interval_calibration: split conformal maximum normalized absolute error within each transport-radius exact system

all_target_outcome_correction.representation: the same frozen 64-dimensional CHGNet crystal feature
all_target_outcome_correction.state: Bayesian-ridge natural parameters with an intercept
all_target_outcome_correction.ridge_penalty: reuse the independently selected transport ridge penalty

simultaneous_decision_interval.trajectory: deterministic SHA256 pair order with floor(system_size/2) target reveals
simultaneous_decision_interval.score: maximum over every pre-reveal round and remaining supported candidate of absolute target-energy error divided by combined transport-and-correction leverage
simultaneous_decision_interval.interpretation: distribution-free system-level simultaneous interval under the registered exchangeability unit; never a Gaussian standard deviation

robust_hull_certificate.stable: candidate upper energy <= lower feasible competing hull energy
robust_hull_certificate.unstable: candidate lower energy > upper feasible competing hull energy

requirements: all three calibration partitions are non-empty, exact-system disjoint, and collectively exhaust task calibration systems
the finite-sample clustered conformal quantile exists
same-order streaming and full replay natural parameters, predictions, and metric inputs are bitwise identical
every revealed target outcome contributes exactly once and no capacity or eviction interface exists
certified stable/unstable decisions have zero error on calibration systems whose simultaneous interval event holds
the deterministic system-bootstrap lower 95% bound for macro certified decision coverage is strictly positive
calibration_gate_before_evaluation.failure_action: seal every evaluation outcome and record calibration-stage NO-GO

baselines: target-only CHGNet ridge plus all-target-outcome correction
environment transport without online target correction

requirements: all evaluation isolation, no-deletion, replay, and homogeneous-null gates pass
the evaluation system-level simultaneous interval-event rate is at least the registered 0.9 coverage level
the system-bootstrap lower 95% bound for certified decision coverage is strictly positive
certified selective hull-decision error is zero on every evaluation system whose simultaneous interval event holds

environment transport plus all-target-outcome correction has a paired exact-system bootstrap 95% upper bound below zero for both hull misclassification and one-step regret relative to target-only and naive source-as-target pooling
the improvement appears in at least two chemical-complexity strata
same-order numerical replay is exact; no runtime or compression claim is made without a separately measured bottleneck
paper_go_rule.failure_action: retain the implementation and negative result, keep paper-level status NO-GO, and do not tune representation, ridge penalty, conformal level, or decision tolerance on evaluation systems
